pending_approvals: Approve clean-mist filter component split into core filter part plus pressure sealing ring.
Approve Lin Zhixia as an emergency nurse rather than leaving doctor/nurse ambiguous.
Whether to preserve the filter-part split as a chapter 3 hook.
Approve the temporary pressure sealing workaround as a chapter 3 execution detail, not a permanent replacement for a standard sealing ring.
Whether the current functional-entry beat is enough to count as Lin Zhixia's first real onboard role, or whether revision should make it more explicit.
Approve chapter 4 limited rescue case - one compliant injured girl is accepted into temporary observation while the rest of the minivan group is refused RV entry.
Approve chapter 4 light trigger for Lu Chenzhou's old mall-fire rescue accident without treating it as a full reveal.
Approve the rescued girl's short Qinghe witness line as a hook, not a full Qinghe reveal.
Approve early fog-dog behavior rule: fog dogs are attracted to blood smell and clean-filter exhaust / rear venting.
Approve Qinghe outer warehouse entrance as the next approach target without treating it as revealing Qinghe Service Area interior.
Approve the provisional onboard contamination triage rule: external injury, mist inhalation observation, and suspected mutation are handled separately.
Approve that temporary observation / isolation does not equal formal boarding qualification.
Approve Qinghe rear warehouse supplies and Old Zheng's key/access control as the chapter 7 material-control hook without treating it as a full Qinghe interior reveal.
Approve Old Zheng as the Qinghe outer-warehouse material controller without treating him as a full Qinghe faction reveal.
Approve the early economy rule: material trade can buy goods or limited service, but cannot buy RV boarding qualification.
Approve the limited resource gain from chapter 7 as usable but insufficient for full repair, full filter recovery, or medical-module unlock.
Approve Old Zheng's broadcast of the RV location as the next pressure hook toward fog-wall backflow / car-seizure escalation.
Approve chapter 8 temporary repair size: useful enough to move, not enough for full RV repair or filter recovery.
Approve early filter-consumption rule: low clean-filter efficiency and rear leakage turn long停留 into a contamination countdown.
Approve chapter 8 as car-seizure night setup, with the full night assault reserved for chapter 9.
Approve that human noise / metal striking can attract fog dogs or fog-side fast targets in this stage.
Approve chapter 9 as the first successful combat test of the RV door rules and internal collaboration rules.
Approve short-term filter stabilization as a limited system payoff, not a full filter repair.
Approve that fog dogs are attracted by human noise, lights, and metal strikes as an early visible ecology rule.
Approve the 青河 medical-power broadcast only as the chapter 10 hook, not as an acquired medical module or completed rescue.
Approve that Zhou Xiaohe remains a temporary observation patient, not a formal onboard member or core teammate.
Approve chapter 10 as the closure of unit_0001 / the first station.
Approve Lin Zhixia's move from temporary co-survivor to committed RV medical-role crew member.
Approve the external-rescue contact rule: verify first, keep retreat line, no blind door opening, and medical value cannot override contamination boundaries.
Approve Qinghe medical point / Simple Medical Bay material signal as a chapter 11 hook only, not as an unlocked module.
Approve early hint that a Qinghe threat may mimic or manipulate voices, without fully defining that ecology yet.

summary: On approval, accept chapter 11 final candidate as chapters/ch_0011.md.
pending_approvals: Approve chapter 11 as Qinghe medical-point exterior validation only, not main-building entry.
Approve No. 2 power box / folding medical frame / isolation film / power interface as verified Simple Medical Bay material leads, not acquired materials.
Approve voice mimicry as an observed Qinghe threat behavior without fully defining the ecology.
Approve the permission-error / welcome-back gate behavior as terminal abnormality and old-protocol unease, not a father-route hard clue.
Approve Zhou Xiaohe remaining a temporary observation patient after providing a useful sound-observation cue.
